breakdown: PR adds RewardsBox TypedDict schema and validate_rewards_box() function for data shape enforcement. Type safety is solid with TypedDict and type checks, but error handling is minimal (returns only True/False with no error details or logging). Test coverage is excellent. Naming is clear and descriptive throughout.
key_changes: Added RewardsBox TypedDict in custom_types.py with 7 required fields (level_up_available, xp_gained, current_xp, next_level_xp, gold, loot, source)
Added validate_rewards_box() validation function with type checking for bool, int, str, list fields
Added _is_int_not_bool() helper to distinguish int from bool in JSON (where bool is also valid)
Added type aliases UserId and CampaignId
Added comprehensive test suite (test_rewards_box_schema.py) with 11 test methods covering schema existence, valid/invalid data, field types, and edge cases
